title: Artillery shelling
title_en: Artillery shelling
title_uk: Артилерійський обстріл
description: A group of occupiers tried to sneak into the rear of the Armed Forces through a gas pipe, and immediately went to Kobzon's concert. 29 Russians wanted to use the old route under the cover of bad weather. Our intelligence, along with UAVs and artillery, quickly explained that the plan was truly ingenious. All 29 targets were destroyed.
description_en: A group of occupiers tried to sneak into the rear of the Armed Forces through a gas pipe, and immediately went to Kobzon's concert. 29 Russians wanted to use the old route under the cover of bad weather. Our intelligence, along with UAVs and artillery, quickly explained that the plan was truly ingenious. All 29 targets were destroyed.
description_uk: Группа оккупантов пыталась пробраться в тыл ВСУ через газовую трубу, а вышла сразу на концерт Кобзона 29 россиян хотели использовать старый маршрут под прикрытием плохой погоды. Наша разведка вместе с БпЛА и артиллерией быстро объяснили, что план был поистине гениальным. Все 29 целей уничтожены.

title: Missile attack on infrastructure
title_en: Missile attack on infrastructure
title_uk: Ракетний удар по інфраструктурі
description: Russia can force Lithuania to capitulate in 90 days even without deploying troops — Defense News The publication writes that such a scenario was modeled by the Baltic Defense Initiative analytical center during the study of the country's defense vulnerabilities. According to the scenario, the Russian Federation first attacks the authorities with hypersonic missiles, and then within 60 days uses more than 170 thousand Shahed drones on the country's infrastructure....
description_en: Russia can force Lithuania to capitulate in 90 days even without deploying troops — Defense News The publication writes that such a scenario was modeled by the Baltic Defense Initiative analytical center during the study of the country's defense vulnerabilities. According to the scenario, the Russian Federation first attacks the authorities with hypersonic missiles, and then within 60 days uses more than 170 thousand Shahed drones on the country's infrastructure....
description_uk: россия может заставить Литву капитулировать за 90 дней даже без ввода войск, — Defence News Издание пишет, что такой сценарий смоделировал аналитический центр Baltic Defense Initiative во время исследования уязвимостей обороны страны. По сценарию, рф сначала атакует органы власти гиперзвуковыми ракетами, а затем в течение 60 дней применяет более 170 тысяч дронов «Шахед» по инфраструктуре страны....

title: Attack attack on energy grid
title_en: Attack attack on energy grid
title_uk: Атака на енергетичну мережу
description: ☢️The Russian attack on the New Safe Confinement of the Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant changed not only the technical condition of the facility, but also the future of Chernobyl itself. In a long interview for UNIAN, the senior nuclear specialist of Greenpeace Ukraine Sean Berny warns: the risk of the old sarcophagus collapsing over the 4th reactor has now become a "virtually inevitable scenario", and the world is still not fully aware of the scale of the threat. It's about...
description_en: ☢️The Russian attack on the New Safe Confinement of the Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant changed not only the technical condition of the facility, but also the future of Chernobyl itself. In a long interview for UNIAN, the senior nuclear specialist of Greenpeace Ukraine Sean Berny warns: the risk of the old sarcophagus collapsing over the 4th reactor has now become a "virtually inevitable scenario", and the world is still not fully aware of the scale of the threat. It's about...
description_uk: ☢️Российский удар по Новому безопасному конфайнменту ЧАЭС изменил не только техническое состояние объекта, но и само будущее Чернобыля. В большом интервью для УНИАН старший ядерный специалист Greenpeace Украина Шон Берни предупреждает: риск обрушения старого саркофага над 4-м реактором теперь стал «фактически неизбежным сценарием», а мир до сих пор не до конца осознаёт масштаб угрозы. Речь идёт...

title: 🇳 Andriy Sybiga held a meeting with the special representative of the...
title_en: 🇳 Andriy Sybiga held a meeting with the special representative of the...
title_uk: 🇳 Андрій Сибіга провів зустріч зі спеціальним представником...
description: 🇳 Andriy Sybiga held a meeting with the special representative of the UN Secretary General on children and armed conflicts, Vanessa Fraser 💬 "For Ukraine, the return of our children is one of the key priorities. I emphasized that lasting peace is impossible without their return home. So far, we have managed to return more than two thousand children, but many of them are still being forcibly and illegally...
description_en: 🇳 Andriy Sybiga held a meeting with the special representative of the UN Secretary General on children and armed conflicts, Vanessa Fraser 💬 "For Ukraine, the return of our children is one of the key priorities. I emphasized that lasting peace is impossible without their return home. So far, we have managed to return more than two thousand children, but many of them are still being forcibly and illegally...
description_uk: 🇳 Андрій Сибіга провів зустріч зі спеціальною представницею Генерального секретаря ООН з питань дітей і збройних конфліктів Ванессою Фрейзер 💬 «Для України повернення наших дітей є одним із ключових пріоритетів. Я наголосив, що сталий мир неможливий без їхнього повернення додому. Наразі нам вдалося повернути понад дві тисячі дітей, однак багато з них досі залишаються примусово та незаконно...

title: Attack attack
title_en: Attack attack
title_uk: Атака нападу
description: For the first time in the history of Ukraine, the courage of our soldiers and the resilience of our people are armed enough to defend themselves against Russian attacks. Russia has not come for the first time to destroy Ukrainian statehood and will. But now Ukrainians are in the strongest positions than they were before - both in 2014, and in the 20th century, and even earlier. This is the historical result of our country: Ukraine was able to withstand a full-scale war...
description_en: For the first time in the history of Ukraine, the courage of our soldiers and the resilience of our people are armed enough to defend themselves against Russian attacks. Russia has not come for the first time to destroy Ukrainian statehood and will. But now Ukrainians are in the strongest positions than they were before - both in 2014, and in the 20th century, and even earlier. This is the historical result of our country: Ukraine was able to withstand a full-scale war...
description_uk: Сміливість наших воїнів та стійкість нашого народу вперше в історії України озброєні достатньо, щоб захищатись від російських ударів. Росія не вперше прийшла знищити українську державність і волю. Але зараз українці на найбільш сильних позиціях, ніж це було раніше – і у 2014 році, і у ХХ столітті, і ще раніше. Це історичний результат нашої держави: Україна змогла вистояти в повномасштабній війні...

title: The future is already at the front, and Ukraine is creating it. These...
title_en: The future is already at the front, and Ukraine is creating it. These...
title_uk: Майбутнє вже на фронті, і Україна його створює. Ці...
description: The future is already at the front, and Ukraine is creating it. These are our ground robotic complexes. For the first time in the history of this war, the enemy's position was taken exclusively by unmanned platforms - NRK and drones. The occupiers surrendered, and this operation was carried out without the participation of infantry and without loss on our part. "Ratel", "termite", "ardal", "lynx", "snake", "protector", "volya" and our other NRCs in just three months completed...
description_en: The future is already at the front, and Ukraine is creating it. These are our ground robotic complexes. For the first time in the history of this war, the enemy's position was taken exclusively by unmanned platforms - NRK and drones. The occupiers surrendered, and this operation was carried out without the participation of infantry and without loss on our part. "Ratel", "termite", "ardal", "lynx", "snake", "protector", "volya" and our other NRCs in just three months completed...
description_uk: Майбутнє вже на фронті, і його творить Україна. Це наші наземні роботизовані комплекси. Вперше в історії цієї війни ворожу позицію було взято виключно безпілотними платформами – НРК та дронами. Окупанти здалися в полон, і цю операцію виконали без участі піхоти й без втрат із нашого боку. «Ратель», «терміт», «ардал», «рись», «змій», «протектор», «воля» та інші наші НРК лише за три місяці виконали...

title: Kyiv: Drone strike
title_en: Kyiv: Drone strike
title_uk: Київ: Дрон-удар
description: Ukrainian drones hit chemical plant in Russian city of Cherepovets, reports suggest. Ukrainian drones struck a major industrial facility in the Russian city of Cherepovets overnight, targeting a chemical plant producing fertilizers and industrial compounds, according to Russian independent outlet Astra.
description_en: Ukrainian drones hit chemical plant in Russian city of Cherepovets, reports suggest. Ukrainian drones struck a major industrial facility in the Russian city of Cherepovets overnight, targeting a chemical plant producing fertilizers and industrial compounds, according to Russian independent outlet Astra.
description_uk: Ukrainian drones hit chemical plant in Russian city of Cherepovets, reports suggest. Ukrainian drones struck a major industrial facility in the Russian city of Cherepovets overnight, targeting a chemical plant producing fertilizers and industrial compounds, according to Russian independent outlet Astra.

title: In the conditions of modern war, it is technology, engineering...
title_en: In the conditions of modern war, it is technology, engineering...
title_uk: В умовах сучасної війни це техніка, техніка...
description: In the conditions of modern war, it is technology, engineering solutions and the speed of adaptation to new challenges that determine the advantage. The Ukrainian defense-industrial complex demonstrates dynamic development, and gunsmiths respond promptly to changes on the battlefield every day. Hundreds of enterprises and hundreds of thousands of specialists work in the industry, providing the Defense Forces with modern weapons and equipment. High-precision systems,...
description_en: In the conditions of modern war, it is technology, engineering solutions and the speed of adaptation to new challenges that determine the advantage. The Ukrainian defense-industrial complex demonstrates dynamic development, and gunsmiths respond promptly to changes on the battlefield every day. Hundreds of enterprises and hundreds of thousands of specialists work in the industry, providing the Defense Forces with modern weapons and equipment. High-precision systems,...
description_uk: В умовах сучасної війни саме технології, інженерні рішення та швидкість адаптації до нових викликів визначають перевагу. Український оборонно-промисловий комплекс демонструє динамічний розвиток, а зброярі щодня оперативно реагують на зміни на полі бою. У галузі працюють сотні підприємств і сотні тисяч фахівців, які забезпечують Сили оборони сучасним озброєнням і технікою. Високоточні системи,...
